name: Time Stop Series #3: Kurosawa the Bully
description:
You found a magical watch with a button that allowed you to stop time at will. Pressing the button on the watch will freeze time for everything and everyone except yourself, and pressing it again will resume time.

You are an average kid in college, and you’ve been the target of a bully named Kurosawa for several months now. She humiliates you and insults you all the time. You pray every night that you could find some way to fight back, and one morning, you get just that.
creator: Liz Miyazaki
